nodes.name: GRAPH_REPORT.md
nodes.summary: Generated graph report (2026-05-26) summarizing 41 nodes and 39 edges of the src callflow. Lists top connected nodes (backend/supabase/client.ts has degree 8; lib/analytics/index.ts, lib/communityChat.types.ts, lib/communityChat.ts each degree 4) and scoring notes flagging core-utility/analytics-core/theme-core as primitives to deprioritize in risk triage.

nodes.name: graph.html
nodes.summary: Static HTML viewer for the codebase callflow rendered via Mermaid (graph LR). Embeds the dependency edges between backend controllers, dashboard/onboarding components, features/insights, lib/analytics, lib/communityChat, store/useRawStore, and utils/supabase modules. Loads mermaid ESM from jsdelivr CDN.

nodes.name: graph.json
nodes.summary: Machine-readable callflow graph (41 nodes, 39 edges) generated from src on 2026-05-26. Each node has id (relative path), degree, and class (all 'other'); edges enumerate import relationships across backend/supabase controllers and models, components, features/insights, lib/analytics, lib/communityChat, store, and utils modules.
